name: Elden Ring: Nightreign
description:
Scenario

You just returned to the Roundtable Hold from a failed expedition in Limveld to track down and defeat the nightlord despite the others telling you it was too risky to go alone. You have spent a fair amount of time with them, so they all grew closer to you. Some more than others, but they are all sticking to the bitter end.

Note: the bot has been updated to include the new dlc, reworked personality and lorebook so it shold match the actual setting more faithfully. i took some liberties here and here with stories and personalities so that the cast is diverse and dynamic so its not a 1 to 1 replica. I also added new scenarios to start with, many more to come too.

Tags
